command: sshpass -p jose ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.205 'mkdir -p /home/jose/.ssh && echo "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIKwnvuMIp7WDtCaT1d4QMLMX0GNiD+w7ENaqdcCY49W1 n8n-bridge" >> /home/jose/.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod 700 /home/jose/.ssh && chmod 600 /home/jose/.ssh/authorized_keys && chown -R jose:jose /home/jose/.ssh && echo jose ALL=\(ALL\) NOPASSWD:ALL | sudo tee /etc/sudoers.d/jose-nopasswd && sudo chmod 440 /etc/sudoers.d/jose-nopasswd && echo SETUP_OK' 2>&1
